raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Fentanyl-related deaths are increasing significantly across the state and nation.",
    "The Centers for Disease Control and Prevention announced that 100,000 people died of overdoses between April 2020 and April 2021.",
    "This was the first time drug-related deaths reached six figures in any 12-month period.",
    "Fentanyl was involved in more than 60 percent of the overdose deaths last year.",
    "Overdose deaths from illegal synthetic opioids like fentanyl have surpassed overdose deaths from all drugs in 2016.",
    "Reports suggest that the high number of overdose deaths is related to fentanyl contamination of cocaine, heroin, methamphetamines, and other drugs."
  ]
}
```
